title: rudgea jasminoides subsp. micrantha
intro: Rudgea jasminoides subsp. micrantha, also known as small-flowered Rudgea, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub-like plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rudgea jasminoides subsp. micrantha include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against oxidative stress. Rudgea jasminoides subsp. micrantha can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
